items.original_text:
As chips continue to grow larger, utilization efficiency on 12-inch wafers remains relatively low. This is also one of the key reasons why CoPoS is being pushed forward so aggressively.
CoWoS Mass Production
Once Again
The primary factor driving this production capacity expansion is the rapid growth of the CoWoS family. According to the report, TSMC's monthly CoWoS production capacity could reach a record high of 120,000 to 140,000 wafers in 2026. With an
items.title: CoWoS产能扩张加速，2026年月产能或创新高

items.title: imec、台积电、ASML首次在300mm晶圆上展示2D TMD

Apple's moat in the age of agents isn't the model. It's the data.
